specific_question: What reduction in incident response time did the company experience after implementing AI-integrated ITSM?
answer: According to the 2024 performance review, MediConn Solutions experienced a 30% decrease in incident response times after implementing AI-integrated ITSM, leading to faster issue resolution and improved customer satisfaction.
